news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Pacira BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCRX) based in Brisbane, California, disclosed the allocation of inducement awards to seven new employees on July 2, 2025. These awards were granted under Pacira’s Amended and Restated 2014 Inducement Plan, serving as a significant inducement for each employee’s recruitment. The awards, approved by the People & Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors without stockholder consent, adhere to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). This move signifies Pacira's commitment to attracting top talent while advancing non-opioid pain therapies for patient well-being.
news.headline: Pacira BioSciences granted inducement awards to 7 new employees on July 2, 2025 under the Inducement Plan.

news.summary: In Hong Kong, Alibaba Group Holding Limited disclosed the pricing of its private offering, termed the "Bond Offering," for HK$12.023 billion in aggregate principal amount of Zero Coupon Exchangeable Bonds due 2032. The Bonds are referenced to the ordinary shares of Alibaba Health Information Technology Limited listed on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. The offering was made under the tickers NYSE: BABA, HKEX: 9988 (HKD Counter), and 89988 (RMB Counter).
news.headline: Alibaba Group priced HK$12.023 billion Zero Coupon Exchangeable Bonds due 2032 referencing Alibaba Health shares.

news.summary: Malaysia-based beauty and personal care brand, Empro Group Inc. (EMPG), has successfully completed its initial public offering on July 3, 2025. The offering consisted of 1,375,000 ordinary shares set at $4.00 per share, resulting in total gross proceeds of around $5,500,000 before deduction of underwriting discounts and other expenses. Trading of the Ordinary Shares commenced on the Nasdaq Capital Market on July 2, 2025, identified by the ticker symbol "EMPG". Additionally, EMPG has granted the underwriter the option to acquire up to 206,250 extra Ordinary Shares at the initial public offering price within 45 days from the Registration Statement's effective date.
news.headline: Empro Group Inc.'s $5.5 million IPO of 1,375,000 shares closed, priced at $4.00 each on July 3, 2025, trading under "EMPG" on Nasdaq.

news.summary: Today in Toronto, The AML Shop has revealed plans to establish a centralized Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU). This initiative is designed to bolster efforts in combating financial crime and providing greater assistance to its anti-money laundering (AML) clientele. This development marks a significant step towards improving the effectiveness of AML measures. The creation of the FIU underlines a commitment to enhancing security and integrity within financial systems.

news.summary: "In a recent development, Congress passed the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, marking a significant milestone in the restoration of the critical Section 45V hydrogen production tax credit. The Fuel Cell and Hydrogen Energy Association (FCHEA) expressed pride in its central role in this achievement. The organization lauded Senate champions, especially Senators Shelly Moore Capito and Bill Cassidy, for acknowledging hydrogen's capacity to generate employment, spur investment, and enhance national energy security. This action not only reinstates the tax credit but also promotes the growth of the U.S. hydrogen sector."
news.headline: Congratulations to FCHEA for helping restore Section 45V hydrogen production tax credit in the One Big Beautiful Act pass. Senators Capito and Cassidy commended for recognizing hydrogen's potential.

news.summary: The S&P 500 is currently trading above 6,200 points, with U.S. equities reaching all-time highs before the July 4 holiday. Long-term valuation metrics are causing concern, as the Buffett Indicator, a tool used by traditional investors, has hit its highest reading ever. This indicator, named after Warren Buffett of Berkshire Hathaway, compares the total value of the U.S. stock market to the country's GDP. It offers insight into how inflated stocks may be relative to the economy's actual size. Buffett himself has endorsed this indicator, calling it a key gauge of stock market valuations. As of July 3, the indicator reveals a 207% ratio between the total U.S. stock market value and GDP. Despite the alarming readings, experts advise against immediate panic selling of stocks. To read the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Buffett Indicator hits record high, with US stock value at 207% of GDP, signaling overinflation. Buffett still backs it.

news.summary: The 2025-2026 World Branding Awards Animalis Edition recently held its fifth event in London, honoring top pet and animal brands worldwide. Recognizing exceptional performance, brands were named National, Regional, and Global Winners at the prestigious Hofburg Palace in Vienna. The ceremony highlighted achievements in various categories such as pet food, retail, wellness, pet exhibitions, and aquatic products, showcasing the diversity and excellence within the industry.
news.headline: Topbreed, SmartHeart, and Superdogs win at 2025-2026 World Branding Awards Animalis Edition in Vienna. 5th edition honoring global pet brands at Hofburg Palace.

news.summary: In 2025, Gold has achieved a rare accomplishment by surpassing Bitcoin's returns in the first half of the year by a double-digit margin. By July 1, Gold has seen a 26% increase year-to-date, its best half-year performance since 2007, while Bitcoin has gained 13% during the same period. Since Bitcoin's launch in 2009, Gold has only outperformed it in three years: 2014, 2018, and 2022, with relative outperformances of 125%, 285%, and 178%, respectively. These gains resulted from significant Bitcoin selloffs rather than substantial Gold rallies. With a 13% lead halfway through 2025, there is speculation on whether this will be the fourth year Gold decisively outperforms the leading digital asset. Bitcoin is exhibiting signs of maturity in 2025, coming out of high volatility and high risk. During the early April tariff-induced selloff, Bitcoin only experienced a 10% drop, indicating a more stable position.
news.headline: Gold has outperformed Bitcoin in the first half of 2025 by double-digit margin. Gold up 26% while Bitcoin up 13%. 2025 could be the fourth year gold beats Bitcoin decisively. Bitcoin showing signs of maturity amid slower ETF inflows.

news.summary: Jennifer Mensik Kennedy, PhD, MBA, RN, NEA-BC, FAAN, president of the American Nurses Association, expressed serious concerns about a recently passed bill in Congress during a statement in Silver Spring, Md on July 3, 2025. The bill has been approved by both houses of Congress and is nearing the final stages of becoming law. Kennedy highlighted the detrimental effects of the bill and underlined the potential consequences it could have.
news.headline: ANA President expresses concern over bill passing in Congress, impacting nurses - H.R. 1 approved by both houses.
